author: mark
text:
Decompose src/cli.rs under the 300-line cap

bl-32e5 grew src/cli.rs to 305 lines, past the 300-line pre-commit cap, leaving make check red on main — bl review's squash never runs the hook, so the line-length gate was skipped on that delivery.

Lift the Command subcommand enum into a new cli_command.rs sibling module and pub use it back from cli, the same shape cli_sub.rs already uses. cli.rs keeps only the Cli parser struct and the re-exports; main.rs gains mod cli_command. Pure code movement, no behavior change.
